author: driver--design-phase-4b-web-md-bbdc
content: Result: Implemented vitreous_web WASM/DOM backend with 6 modules. styles.rs: Style->CSS conversion (Color, Dimension, Edges, Corners, font, transitions, shadows, cursor, overflow). aria.rs: AccessibilityInfo->ARIA attributes (role, label, checked, expanded, live, value range). events.rs: DOM events->vitreous events (mouse, keyboard, scroll, focus/blur) with Closure lifecycle management. dom.rs: DOM element creation from Node tree with key-based reconciliation. mount.rs: mount() function with reactive effect loop. web_apis.rs: fetch, localStorage, History API navigation. 28 unit tests pass, 0 clippy warnings, formatting clean.
